name: tx402.ai — Agent LLM Gateway
description: x402 payment gateway for agent-native EU LLM inference. 20+ models (DeepSeek, Qwen, Llama, GLM, Mixtral) with USDC micropayments on Base. No API keys, no accounts — wallet is auth. OpenAI-compatible API, SSE streaming, GDPR-compliant with zero data retention. Powered by Tensorix EU infrastructure.
